prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia opens an archive cabinet with two old blog notebooks labeled "CSDN" and "博客园". A dusty old post ribbon connects to a new clean blog notebook.

Core meaning: old writing platforms and past blogging history lead into the new blog.

Style: warm Chinese blog illustration, white background, black/red/white, slight nostalgic paper texture. Minimal labels: "旧博客", "重新开始", "记录".

Avoid real website screenshots, avoid clutter.
